override.reason: Completed implementation features for tracking-ui-followup-2 declare no fulfills assertions, so this milestone has no standalone user-testing assertion scope. A flow validator attempted VAL-CROSS-002 and hit an auth-session blocker on the reused runtime, but VAL-CROSS-002 was already validated as passed in tracking-mainline and this milestone does not own that assertion. Current evidence still shows the scoped regression spec passes directly under `vp run test:e2e:website -- apps/website/e2e/app-shell.real-runtime.spec.ts`.
